name: mysql-common
title: mysql-common
description:
MySQL database common files, e.g. /etc/mysql/my.cnf
MySQL is a fast, stable and true multi-user, multi-threaded SQL database
server. SQL (Structured Query Language) is the most popular database query
language in the world. The main goals of MySQL are speed, robustness and
ease of use.
.
This package includes files needed by all versions of the client library,
e.g. /etc/mysql/my.cnf.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use mysql-common because MySQL database common files, e.g. /etc/mysql/my.cnf.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use mysql-common as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair mysql-common with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `mysql-common --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
